'''galaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avenage|avenage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avenage|avenage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| galaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gælægæth|gælægæth]] || [[word:gælægæj|gælægæj]] || [[word:gælægæsh|gælægæsh]] || [[word:gælægæ|gælægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:galalagath|galalagath]] || [[word:galalagaj|galalagaj]] || [[word:galalagash|galalagash]] || [[word:galalaga|galalaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:galagath|galagath]] || [[word:galagaj|galagaj]] || [[word:galagash|galagash]] || [[word:galaga|galaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:galafgafth|galafgafth]] || [[word:galafgafj|galafgafj]] || [[word:galafgafsh|galafgafsh]] || [[word:galafgaf|galafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:galagatha|galagatha]] || [[word:galagaja|galagaja]] || [[word:galagasha|galagasha]] || [[word:galagaka|galagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:galagath|galagath]] || [[word:galagaj|galagaj]] || [[word:galagash|galagash]] || [[word:galaga|galaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:galagathal|galagathal]] || [[word:galagajal|galagajal]] || [[word:galagashal|galagashal]] || [[word:galagakal|galagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:galagaathatha|galagaathatha]] || [[word:galagaajaja|galagaajaja]] || [[word:galagaashasha|galagaashasha]] || [[word:galagaaka|galagaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:galagathan|galagathan]] || [[word:galagajan|galagajan]] || [[word:galagashan|galagashan]] || [[word:galagakan|galagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:galagathaoro|galagathaoro]] || [[word:galagajaoro|galagajaoro]] || [[word:galagashaoro|galagashaoro]] || [[word:galagakaoro|galagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
